refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time by optimizing load, travel, and dump phases to meet the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-FRs for each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows targeted design and verification of each phase's contribution to overall cycle time.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for each sub-phase under representative duty cycles and site conditions, then aggregate to verify overall cycle time target.
sub_frs: Minimize load phase time to meet load time target
Minimize travel phase time to meet travel time target
Minimize dump phase time to meet dump time target

candidate_dps: Optimize vehicle powertrain and control algorithms for cycle phases
Implement teleoperation support to reduce operator delays
Integrate safety services to enable safe high-speed operations
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize vehicle powertrain and control algorithms for cycle phases

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and teleoperation commands
coupling_check.notes: DP focuses on vehicle control optimization; interfaces with teleoperation and safety are well-defined and modular.

assumptions_risks: Vehicle control optimization alone can achieve cycle time targets without excessive reliance on teleoperation.
Safety constraints will not unduly limit cycle time improvements.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit DP for teleoperation and safety integration if cycle time targets are not met.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and control systems responsible for vehicle powertrain and cycle phase execution

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends cycle phase status and performance data to NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle receives commands for cycle phase execution from NGHE Solution and Teleoperation.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle exchanges safety status and alerts with Safety Services.

module_containment_scores.notes: High-level coordination, not direct vehicle control.
Primary containment of vehicle control DP; low diffusion risk.
Supports operator commands but does not contain vehicle control logic.
Monitors and enforces safety constraints; interfaces with vehicle.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module fully contains the DP for cycle time optimization, minimizing diffusion and enabling clear ownership.
containment_risks: Potential overlap of control logic with Teleoperation module if teleoperation commands override vehicle autonomy.
Safety constraints may require cross-module coordination increasing diffusion.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify boundaries and interfaces with Teleoperation and Safety Services to reduce diffusion risk.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement into sub-FRs is clear and DP selection logically addresses the main FR with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Possible diffusion of control logic between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Safety Services interaction may increase interface complexity.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module is the best containment candidate for the DP with clear interfaces.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring cycle times and monitoring interface data flows.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of DP to Vehicle module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Define explicit interface protocols to minimize diffusion between Vehicle and Teleoperation.
Review safety constraints integration to avoid performance degradation.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, risks related to diffusion and safety integration require refinement before proceeding.
next_level_sub_frs: Minimize load phase time to meet load time target
Minimize travel phase time to meet travel time target
Minimize dump phase time to meet dump time target

revise.why: Clarify and tighten module boundaries and interfaces to reduce diffusion risks and ensure safety constraints are properly integrated.

assumptions: Vehicle control optimization can meet cycle time targets independently.
Safety constraints will not overly restrict cycle time improvements.
open_risks: Diffusion of control logic between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Safety Services integration may impact cycle time.
evidence_needed: Performance data showing vehicle control alone can meet cycle time targets.
Interface specifications and safety constraint impact analysis.
